meta.title: Hack The Box: The #1 Cybersecurity Performance Center

meta.name: description
meta.content: HTB is the leading Cybersecurity Performance Center for advanced frontline teams to aspiring security professionals & students. Start driving peak cyber performance.
Hack The Box: The #1 Cybersecurity Performance Center
HTB is the leading Cybersecurity Performance Center for advanced frontline teams to aspiring security professionals & students. Start driving peak cyber performance.

img.p:
An interactive and guided skills development platform for corporate teams
looking to master offensive, defensive, and general security domains.

img.h2: Deal with the latest attacks and cyber threats!
img.p:
Ensure learning retention with hands-on skills development through a
growing collection of real-world scenarios in a dedicated team environment.

Assess and certify your team's skills and problem-solving abilities
with complex, realistic corporate scenarios.

Benchmark your team capability and analyze skill gaps with engaging
competitions featuring market-leading cybersecurity content.

img.h2: AI-powered tabletops for executive and cyber teams
img.p:
We are redefining traditional TTXs to fully measure and develop
organizational crisis readiness. See how your staff reacts under pressure
and protect the pivotal assets in your organization.

img.h2: Recruit and develop your next team member!
img.p:
Source future talent directly from our 2.5M community of skilled
individuals and develop clear career paths.

From comprehensive beginner-level to advanced online courses covering
offensive, defensive, or general security domains.

img.h2: Deal with the latest attacks and cyber threats!
img.p:
Ensure learning retention with hands-on skills development through a
growing collection of real-world scenarios in a dedicated classroom
environment.

Benchmark your classroom capability and analyze skill gaps with
engaging competitions featuring market-leading cybersecurity content.

Bridge the gap between education and the dynamic job market with
industry recognized certifications.

Unlock 40+ courses on HTB Academy for $8/month. Kickstart your
cyber career from the fundamentals.

Access exclusive business features and training service by bringing HTB
to your classroom.

div.class: font-size14 color-green bg-color-green-rgba border-radius-42 px-2 py-1 mr-2

img.p:
From comprehensive beginner-level to advanced online courses
covering offensive, defensive, or general security domains.
An ever-expanding pool of labs with new scenarios released every week.

img.h2: Looking for a real gamified hacking experience?
img.p: Measure your skills in dynamic cybersecurity competitions.

img.h2: Land your first job in cyber.
img.p:
Recruiters from the best companies worldwide are hiring through
Hack The Box.

Skyrocket your resume and land your dream job with industry recognized
certifications.

div.p: Develop and measure all aspects of your team's cyber performance on a single cloud-based platform. Includes 1,200+ labs and exclusive business features.
Prepare for your future in cybersecurity with interactive, guided training and certifications. Become a market-ready cyber professional.
1,000+ realistic, hands-on labs focusing on the latest technologies and attack vectors. Free labs released every week!
Explore 100+ challenges and build your own CTF event. Test your skills in an engaging event simulating real-world dynamics.

h2.class: color-white font-size24 font-size32-xxs font-size42-xl line-height-28 line-height-37-xxs line-height-48-xl font-weight800 letter-spacing-02

div.h2:
Loved by hackers.
Trusted by organizations.

div.class: col-md-3 d-none d-md-flex justify-content-start justify-content-md-end carousel-actions py-4 py-md-0
company-card d-flex flex-column justify-content-between bg-color-blue-bg border-radius-8 h-100
div.p: Since we introduced Hack The Box, the team can now quickly learn the theoretical and practical sides of penetration testing with very in-depth and up-to-date materials. To spice up the learning, we have a "Hacker of the Month" where we recognize the most progressive employee in our lab environment.
Alexis Lingad, Information Security Analyst, PUMA SE

div.class: company-card d-flex flex-column justify-content-between bg-color-blue-bg border-radius-8 h-100
div.p: Hack The Box has been an invaluable resource in developing and training our team. The content is extremely engaging through the gamified approach and the pace at which new and high quality content is updated ensures our team's skills are always sharp. The labs offer a breadth of technical challenge and variety, unparalleled anywhere else in the market.
Josiah Beverton, Lead Security Consultant, Context

div.class: company-card d-flex flex-column justify-content-between bg-color-blue-bg border-radius-8 h-100
div.p: Hack The Box has been great for recruitment to quickly establish the caliber of ethical hacking candidates . The platform provides a credible overview of a professional's skills and ability when selecting the right hire. An active HTB profile strengthens a candidate's position in the job market, making them stand out from the crowd and highlighting their commitment to skill development.
Ryan Virani, UK Team Lead, Adeptis

div.class: company-card d-flex flex-column justify-content-between bg-color-blue-bg border-radius-8 h-100
div.p: My team and I used Professional Labs from Hack The Box to get used to the new trends of the Red Team concept. After a lot of positive frustration, dedication, and self-study we managed to finish the challenge and leave with much more knowledge than we had before. I strongly recommend this service to teams composed of dedicated persons, who love the technical aspects of penetration testing and also enjoy assisted self-study.
Silas Francisco, Lead Penetration Tester, SIEMENS

div.class: company-card d-flex flex-column justify-content-between bg-color-blue-bg border-radius-8 h-100
div.p: Our offensive security team was looking for a real-world training platform to test advanced attack tactics. We couldn't be happier with the Professional Labs environment. The lab was fully dedicated, so we didn't share the environment with others. The HTB support team has been excellent to make the training fit our needs.
Christian Adounvo, Head of Offensive Security, NortonLifeLock

div.class: company-card d-flex flex-column justify-content-between bg-color-blue-bg border-radius-8 h-100
div.p: The best defense is a good offensive mindset. Hack The Box has enabled our security engineers a deeper understanding on how adversaries work in a real world environment. I provided a learn-at-your-own-pace training experience for my team and track progress towards agreed upon goals. Their knowledge of exploitation, privilege escalation, and system enumeration has grown exponentially since purchasing HTB.
Richard Kaufmann, Information Security Professional, Amedisys

div.class: company-card d-flex flex-column justify-content-between bg-color-blue-bg border-radius-8 h-100
div.p: As defenders, it would be a great mistake to think that offensive knowledge is not a must-have in our skillset. HTB Academy helps our team gain that knowledge at their own pace, by providing quality and easy-to-follow content. From the curious software engineer to our best analysts, custom learning paths allow us to build the best experience for every kind of security enthusiast.
John Ao, L3 SOC Analyst, Dassault Systemes

div.class: company-card d-flex flex-column justify-content-between bg-color-blue-bg border-radius-8 h-100
div.p: Deployment of boxes on the Hack The Box Enterprise Platform is as easy as pressing a button and within one minute, the box is available. By making use of the Enterprise platform and Hack The Box Academy, we have been able to onboard new joiners more efficiently and promote internal mobility for our security assessments team.
Firat Acar, Red Team Cybersecurity Consultant at NVISO
